title: premna fordii
intro: Premna fordii, also known as Ford's Premna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Premna fordii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Premna fordii is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
